    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    ArrayUtils
    This class implements methods to manipulate arrays and vectors data, for example it allows remove lines from an objects vector.
    CenterWindow
    This class manages to center a child window on a parent window.
    FileChooserFilter
    A generic File Filter for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserHelper
    A generic File Chooser Helper for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserPreview
    A generic File Chooser Preview for files, to use in FileChooser.
    FileChooserView
    A generic File View for files, to use in FileChooser.
    IconUtils
    Creates an Image Icon from a file or an Object.
    PathUtils
    This class implements a singleton pattern object that handles the manipulation of path strings.
    PrintUtils
    This class handles the printing of an arbitrary Java GUI component.
    SplashScreenManager
    This class manages the Java 1.6 (and above) SplashScreen object.
    TranslationUtils
    This class manages the translation of the Java AWT/Swing UI widgets like the dialogues for Color Chooser and Load and Save.
